name: Light Chicken Quiche
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Chicken, white meat, cooked and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Lightly spray a 9-inch pie pan with vegetable oil cooking spray (butter-flavored).
3. Combine 2 tablespoons non-fat Parmesan cheese with Paprika and set aside.
4. Stack and cut sheets of phyllo dough in half.
5. Place one square of phyllo in the pie pan, lightly spray with vegetable oil cooking spray, and sprinkle with 1 teaspoon cheese mixture.
6. Layer remaining squares and cheese mixture in the same manner.
7. Combine egg whites, egg beaters, ricotta, flour, and milk. Stir in chicken, Swiss cheese, vegetables, and green onions.
8. Pour into prepared pie crust.
9. Sprinkle with freshly grated Parmesan.
10. Bake for 30 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool for 10 minutes.
